message:
fix(errors): normalize all err.kind values to kebab-case + golden envelope test [al19b][kcukm][jyn5r]

Convert 33 snake_case err.kind literals to kebab-case in src/lib.rs (49 sites),
matching the 3 that existed in both forms (empty_session, opencode_parse,
opencode_sqlite_parse). Update 2 test assertions in html_export_integration.rs.

Add tests/golden_error_envelope.rs with 3 tests:
  - error_kinds_are_strictly_kebab_case: regex scan ensures no underscores
  - error_kinds_golden_coverage: every kind in source ↔ golden, no drift
  - error_kinds_exit_codes_match_golden: exit code mapping frozen

Golden: tests/golden/robot/error_envelope_kinds.json.golden covers all 81 kinds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
